title: India's Coal-Derived Electricity Generation Remains Strong
section_path: India's Coal-Derived Electricity Generation Remains Strong
section_path_text: India's Coal-Derived Electricity Generation Remains Strong
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we highlighted in our most recent Weekly Dry Bulk Report, new daily coronavirus cases in India have stayed well below May 6's peak of 414,433 cases. Overall, India continuing to recover from its recent coronavirus surge has continued to lessen the chance of new widespread lockdowns in India. Both Indian coal production and electricity production are each likely to climb further in the near term.
